subject_options: Core Health and Performance — one gap worth closing
Turning 53 five-star reviews into direct bookings
What happens after someone finds you on Google
email_body:
I came across Core Health and Performance while looking at fitness businesses in Westport and wanted to reach out directly.

You have a perfect 5-star rating across 53 Google reviews, which is a genuinely strong signal for anyone searching for a trainer or clinic in the area. The one thing the site does not currently offer is a way for that person to book a session on the spot — there is no scheduling option, so a motivated visitor has to take an extra step to follow through.

I work with health and wellness businesses on focused conversion improvements — in this case, integrating a booking system into your existing Wix site, along with some mobile contact improvements to make it easier for people to act quickly.

Would you be open to a short walkthrough call where I can show you exactly what a booking integration would look like on your current site and what it would take to get it live?

Best regards
[Your name]
cta: Would you be open to a short walkthrough call where I can show you exactly what a booking integration would look like on your current site and what it would take to get it live?
follow_up_body:
I sent a note last week about adding a booking integration to your Wix site — wanted to follow up briefly in case it got buried.

The short version is that with 53 five-star reviews driving trust, a direct scheduling option could close the gap between someone finding you and actually becoming a client. It is a contained piece of work with no platform change required.

Is this something you would consider over the coming months, or is there someone else on your end who looks after the website?
personalisation_tokens_used: Wix platform (referenced to frame the offer as working within the existing setup)
